arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres transfer latest: Arsenal get GOOD NEWS over Sporting CP star
arts.sum: While there have been suggestions that he could leaving Sporting in January – PSG were notably said to be preparing a bid of €100 million to match his release clause – the likelihood is now that the Sweden international will remain in Lisbon until the summer. Arsenal have been given some good news over their prospects of landing Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres in the summer – but this has been offset by a less encouraging update.

arts.ttl: Man Utd given clear message about Viktor Gyokeres as ‘talks’ begin
arts.sum: Manchester United and Bayern Munich are reportedly set to battle it out for the signing of Viktor Gyokeres, with Ruben Amorim told exactly why he needs to buy the Swede again

arts.ttl: Preview: Sporting Lisbon vs. Benfica - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Taca da Liga clash between Sporting Lisbon and Benfica, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
